cb_layout: c0:RM_input c1:gamma c2:beta c8:reduce_scaler c10:epsilon c16:output_rm c24:tilized c25:mean c26:centered c27:sq_centered c28:variance_fp32 c29:inv_std c30:pre_untilize

description: Reader RM sticks + compute tilize/untilize passthrough + writer RM sticks

approach: TensorAccessor for RM sticks, 32 sticks per block into c_0 as Wt tile-sized pages, prepare_reduce_scaler for c_8 (1/W) and c_10 (epsilon)
tilize c_0->c_24 then untilize c_24->c_16 passthrough, compute_kernel_hw_startup(c_0,c_8,c_16), WaitBlock mode for both helpers
TensorAccessor for interleaved RM output, wait Wt tiles in c_16, extract 32 sticks per block, noc_async_write with barrier per block

change: replaced input_tensor.buffer_page_size() with ttnn.tile_size(ttnn.bfloat16) for bf16_tile_size and ttnn.tile_size(ttnn.float32) for fp32_tile_size
reason: buffer_page_size() returns stick_size for RM tensors, not tile_size. All CBs need tile-sized pages (2048 for bf16).

upstream_fixes: fixed bf16_tile_size from buffer_page_size() to ttnn.tile_size(ttnn.bfloat16)

description: Add reduce-mean (SUM REDUCE_ROW with 1/W scaler) and subtract-mean (SUB COL broadcast) between tilize and untilize

approach: Added Phase 2: reduce<SUM,REDUCE_ROW,NoWaitNoPop> c_24->c_25 with explicit cb_wait_front(c_24,Wt). Added Phase 3: sub<COL,NoWaitNoPop,WaitUpfrontNoPop> c_24,c_25->c_26 with manual pops. Changed untilize from c_24 to c_26. Added persistent waits for c_8,c_10.

cb_summary: c0:Wt/Wt c8:1/persist c10:1/persist c24:Wt/Wt(manual_pop) c25:1/1(manual_pop) c26:Wt/Wt c16:Wt/Wt

description: Add phases 4-7: square centered, reduce variance, add_eps+rsqrt, multiply by inverse std. Full layer norm without affine.

approach: Added Phase 4: square<NoWaitNoPop> c_26->c_27 (c_26 persists). Phase 5: reduce<SUM,REDUCE_ROW,NoWaitNoPop> c_27->c_28 + pop c_27. Phase 6: add<SCALAR,WaitAndPopPerTile,NoWaitNoPop> c_28,c_10->c_29 with rsqrt post_op. Phase 7: mul<COL,NoWaitNoPop,WaitUpfrontNoPop> c_26,c_29->c_30 + pop c_26,c_29. Untilize now from c_30.

cb_summary: c0:Wt/Wt c8:1/persist c10:1/persist c24:Wt/Wt c25:1/1 c26:Wt/Wt c27:Wt/Wt c28:1/1 c29:1/1 c30:Wt/Wt c16:Wt/Wt
